vanilla-cupcakes-for-kids-argiro.name: Vanilla Cupcakes For Kids

ingredients.item: 13.4 cup of flower inflamed by itsself
1 cup of flour for all uses
13.4 cup of flower inflamed by itsself
1 cup of flour for all uses

instructions: Preheat the evening first to 160°C, in the air.
Place on the baking pans for cupcakes (12 cases each) the paper cases.
In the mixer's bowl, add the butter and beat for 3-4 minutes.
Add the rainy sugar and beat the mixture in the mixer for 3-4 minutes, soften.
Add the eggs one by one, the mixture must absorb them before dropping the next.
Drop the vanilla.
Shake the flours with sieve and alternately add flour and milk.
Balance the mixture in the cases, filling by 3/4.
Bake for 20-23 minutes in a well preheated oven. We mustn't overcooked them. They must be damp.
They are ready when we gently push the top and it comes back.
Leave them for 5 minutes to stand in the form and put them on a rack to cool.
Cut them in half (cap), fill them with butter cream of our liking or with many different colors, place the lid and cover the whole.

vegan-chocolate-cookies-step-by-step-rec.name: Vegan Chocolate Cookies, Step By Step Recipe
vegan-chocolate-cookies-step-by-step-rec.original_name: Galletas de chocolate veganas, receta paso a paso

ingredients.item: 300 gr de harina de avena o almendras
70 gr de cacao en polvo vegano

instructions: Begin your recipe and preheat the oven at 190 ° C.
Procede y tamiza la harina de almendras o de avena. Vierte en un bol.
Then add a tablespoon of baking powder, sugar and cocoa powder. It's a good mix to integrate everything.
Procede a incorporar la leche de soja y dos cucharadas de aceite de oliva.
With the help of your hands, you will be integrating all the ingredients very well until you form a soft and very homogeneous mass. Also you can mix with a mixer if you have this.

Once you have your dough ready, divide into equal portions and shape balls. Then you'll smash her and put her onto a plate with paper or previously frosted. It leaves about 3 cm of separation between every cookie.
Take the oven for about 15 minutes by 190ºC or until baked and golden.
Saca, deja reposar y degusta.
Enjoy them!

vegan-southern-peach-cobbler.name: Vegan Southern Peach Cobbler
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Coat a 9-inch square baking pan with cooking spray.
Combine almond milk and vinegar in a small bowl; set aside about 5 minutes.

Beat margarine and 2 tablespoons white sugar together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Cut in flour and baking powder using a fork or pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in almond milk mixture and vanilla extract until just combined; set aside biscuit mixture.
Toss peaches, brown sugar, ¼ cup white sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon together in a bowl to coat; transfer to the prepared pan. Top with biscuit mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until biscuit tops are lightly browned, 40 to 45 minutes. Serve warm.

vegetarian-nori-miso.name: Vegetarian Nori Miso
instructions: Combine vegetable broth and water in a large pot; bring to a boil. Drop egg whites into the boiling broth and boil until egg whites are cooked, about 10 seconds. Skim egg whites from surface of broth using a slotted spoon and transfer to a plate to cool.

Reduce heat to medium. Mix miso paste, ginger paste, and sesame oil into broth using a potato masher or ladle until fully incorporated. Add edamame, mushrooms, spring onion, garlic, and soy sauce to miso broth; cover pot with a lid, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook until mushrooms are no longer floating on the surface, about 10 minutes.

Mix tofu and cayenne pepper into miso broth. Tear cooled egg whites into small pieces and add to miso broth. Stir nori and sugar into miso broth; cover pot and simmer, stirring occasionally, until soup flavors have blended, about 1 hour.

vermicelli-with-milk-teleculinaria.name: Vermicelli With Milk
instructions: Place 700 ml of milk in a pot, add the lemon peels, cinnamon stick and butter and let it boil. Add the license and let it boil for another 3 minutes.
Then add the sugar, stir and let cook for another 5 minutes.
Com uma vara de arames, mexa as gemas com o restante leite e verta-as em fio sobre a aletria, mexendo sempre. Deixe cozinhar mais 3 minutos, sem deixar ferver.
Retire, coloque numa travessa, deixe arrefecer e sirva polvilhada com canela.

village-dough-for-a-sweet-tart-argiro.name: Village Dough For A Sweet Tart

ingredients.item: 180 gr very cold butter cut into small pieces (pea size)
180 gr very cold butter cut into small pieces (pea size)

instructions: In the mixer cutters or bowl with 2 knives, cut the flour with salt and cold butter.
Drizzle with cold water to wet the dough and shake the bowl to get well wet.
Then spread the membrane, empty the dough and press to become a plate disc.
Cover with membrane and store for 30 minutes in the refrigerator or up to 4 weeks in the freezer.

village-pasta-pie-argiro.name: Village Pasta Pie
instructions: First boil the pasta in salted water for 10 minutes.
Drain well and put them back in the pot.
Add the butter and mix to melt while the pasta is still warm.
Let the pasta cool for a while.
In a large bowl, beat the eggs with the yogurt.
Add the milk and cheese to the ground.
Add salt and pepper and pour the pasta into the pot.
Mix to hang the pasta around.
In a deep baking pan of 36 or 38 cm, add the six sheets by oiling them in between.
Empty the filling and straighten the surface with a spoon.
Cover the hilly pie with the remaining leaves by oiling them in between.
We turn the edges of the leaves by turning them into a coth around.
We cut the surface into pieces.
Sprinkle the whole surface with some olive oil.
Toss with the fingers sprinkle the surface of the pasta pie with some water.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 180°C for about 1 hour until well golden.
The pasta pie comes out inflatable like a souffle from the oven. She needs to cool down a little, then cut her to pieces.
